raw_consumer_statement: Hello, PROBLEM : In XXXX of 2025 I got charged twice for a car rental. I was going to my aunt 's funeral. I used my Citi Thank you preferred credit card to book with points that I had earned. The car booking was XXXX. WhenI got to Texas I learned the car did not have navigation features. I upgraded because I was tasked to drive my relatives during this sad time. I was told by the rental car clerk that I would pay just a little more. I handed him my Citi XXXX Credit card but got a big charge of XXXX. So I paid TWICE. I tried calling, chatting, emailing, and disputing. None of that worked and my disputed were denied because they say I DID rent a car. I do not dispute the rental. I dispute the being charged twice. I have tried to fight this for months and I can not resolve it. Please help me.
